home.partialRefundDesc: {percent}% refund if cancelled at least {days} days before

roomMap.noLocationsDesc: Room types without saved coordinates still appear in the list.

addons.title: Enhance Your Stay
addons.subtitle: Customize your experience with our premium services and activities.

book.pleaseProvide: Please provide your details to complete your reservation.
book.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Any special requests or preferences for your stay...
book.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
book.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

payment.cardAuthNote: An authorization hold will be placed on your card
payment.payAtPropertyNote: Pay at check-in — cash & card accepted, no online payment needed
payment.payAtPropertyCashOnly: Pay with cash at check-in — no online payment needed
payment.payAtPropertyCardOnly: Pay with card at check-in — no online payment needed
payment.cardAuthExplanation: Your card will be authorized but not charged until we accept your booking. The hold will be released if the booking is declined or expires.
payment.cardNextStep: You will enter your card details in the next step.
payment.payAtPropertyExplanation: No payment is required now. You will pay directly at the property upon check-in. We'll review your booking request.
payment.payAtPropertyExplanationInstant: No payment is required now. You will pay directly at the property upon check-in. Your booking will be confirmed instantly.
payment.bankTransferNote: Transfer directly to our bank account
payment.nonRefundablePaymentHint: Pay at Property and Bank Transfer are not available for non-refundable rates.
payment.bankTransferExplanation: Please transfer the total amount to the bank account below. Your booking will be confirmed once we verify the payment.
payment.paypalHelper: Send payment manually; we'll confirm it once received.
payment.paypalInstructions: Send payment to the PayPal email below and include your booking reference in the PayPal note after your booking is created. Your booking will be confirmed once we verify the payment, typically within {hours} hours.
payment.agreeTerms: I agree to the <terms>Terms and Conditions</terms> and <cancellation>Cancellation Policy</cancellation>. I understand that my card will be charged {amount} upon confirmation.
payment.agreeTermsProperty: I agree to the <terms>Terms and Conditions</terms> and <cancellation>Cancellation Policy</cancellation>. I understand that payment will be collected at the property upon check-in.
payment.cancellationPolicyDesc: Free cancellation until {date}. After this date, the first night will be charged.
payment.confirmPaymentDesc: Complete your payment to submit the booking request. Your card will be authorized but not charged until we accept.
payment.authorizationNote: Your card will only be charged if we accept your booking within 24 hours.
payment.xenditNote: OVO, DANA, ShopeePay, GoPay, or Indonesian bank transfer via Xendit
payment.xenditExplanation: You will be redirected to a secure payment page where you can pay with QRIS, OVO, DANA, ShopeePay, GoPay, or bank transfer. We'll review your booking after payment is confirmed.
payment.errorSoldOut: Unfortunately this room just sold out. Please choose another room or different dates.
payment.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while creating your booking. Please try again, or pick another room.

myBooking.title: My Booking
myBooking.notFound: No booking found with that reference and email.
myBooking.lookUpDesc: Enter your booking reference and email address to view your reservation details.
myBooking.notFound: No booking found with that reference and email.
myBooking.fullRefund: You will receive a full refund of {amount}.
myBooking.partialRefund: You will receive a partial refund of {amount} ({percentage}%).
myBooking.noRefund: No refund will be issued for this cancellation.
myBooking.bookingWithdrawn: Your booking request has been withdrawn.

confirmation.title: Booking Confirmed!
confirmation.subtitle: Your reservation has been successfully confirmed.
confirmation.pendingSubtitle: Your booking request has been sent to us. We'll respond within 24 hours.
confirmation.cancelledCardSubtitle: Your booking has been cancelled. Any authorization hold on your card has been released.
confirmation.declinedSubtitle: We declined your booking request. We encourage you to explore alternative dates or properties.
confirmation.declinedCardSubtitle: We declined your booking request. Any authorization hold on your card has been released.
confirmation.expiredSubtitle: Your booking request expired because we did not respond within 24 hours. Any card hold has been released.
confirmation.emailNotice: A confirmation email has been sent to your email address.
confirmation.changePendingDesc: We'll review your requested change and email you once we respond.

requestChange.title: Request Booking Changes
requestChange.subtitle: Pick the new dates or add-ons you'd like. We'll review and approve before anything is applied.
requestChange.missingEmail: This page must be opened from the booking confirmation link.
requestChange.pendingExists: A change request is already pending approval for this booking. Please wait for us to respond.
requestChange.addonsHint: Picking nothing here keeps the booking without add-ons; selecting an add-on adds it to the booking once we approve it.

refer.title: Refer a Guest
refer.step1Desc: Earn 5% commission on every booking made through your link.
refer.step2Desc: Connect your Stripe account to receive commission payouts automatically.
refer.step3Desc: Share your unique link to start earning!
refer.creator: Creator
refer.stripeOnboardingOpened: Stripe onboarding opened — complete it in the new tab
refer.commissionInfo: You will receive 5% of the total booking revenue for every successful direct booking made via your link.
refer.pendingReview: Your application is pending review. We'll notify you at {email} once approved.

error.tryAgainLater: We couldn't fetch the hotel data. Please try again later.
